name: Pilates Corkscrew
shortDescription: A Pilates core exercise where the legs draw a circular motion to challenge abdominal stability.
instructions: Lie on your back with arms at your sides and legs extended overhead. Lift your hips slightly off the mat, then circle your legs in a controlled motion, using your core to stabilize and reverse the direction after each circle.
steps: Lie on back, arms by side, legs straight up.
Engage core, lift hips off mat gently.
Circle legs together in a clockwise motion.
Lower hips as legs complete the circle.
breathing: Exhale as you circle legs, inhale to prepare.
